# Client Instructions

Canonical source: `AGENTS.md`.

Web frontend work belongs in `apps/dsa-web/` and must follow the validation matrix in `AGENTS.md`.

For Figma-driven UI work, read `docs/figma-to-code-guidelines.md` before implementation. Align the full-page frame first, then implement local components. Put reusable colors, dimensions, spacing, radii, shadows, and state styles in `apps/dsa-web/src/index.css` tokens or semantic classes.
